creator: support@spectrum.ru
text:
Hello.

This is a new path for update net-mgmt/argus3-clients up to 3.0.2. The
previous path is not correct. New path attached.
Mini how-to:
1. cd /usr/ports/
2. rm net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/*
3. touch net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-clients_Makefile.in \
net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-common_Makefile.in \
net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-common_argus_util.c \
net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-radium_Makefile.in \
net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-radump_Makefile.in \
net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-ramysql_Makefile.in \
net-mgmt/argus3-clients/files/patch-ratop_Makefile.in
3. apply path

Thanks for fluffy@ for your help.

-- 
Demin Alexander / Network Administrator
Group of companies Spectrum / tel. (+7 495) 995-8999
Russia, Moscow, 125009, Strastnoy blvr. 8
Web: http://www.spectrum.ru/
